summary: Iteration 8 frontend validation PASSED. Verified the new 'Trusted by Industry & Academia' section renders between Credibility Strip and What VocalFitness Is, with 5 corporate logos (BASF, Accenture, Dell, BCG, Electrolux), 6 additional client pills (Mediaset, Yamazaki Mazak, Hitachi, TEVA, DIPHARMA, Alfio Bardolla), and 10 academic partners (EF Education First, Cambridge Assessment, Oxford Alumni, Università di Torino — LFSAG, Università eCampus, MUR & MIUR, DIESSE, H-Farm & Link, Senato della Repubblica, Harvard BS Roma) — all in correct order via data-testid. Navbar shows exactly 7 items in both IT (Home, Metodo, Processo, Programmi, Risultati, Testimonial, Professor) and EN (Home, Method, Process, Programmes, Results, Testimonials, Professor) — Aziende/Companies confirmed removed. Bilingual EN↔IT toggle works for the trusted section ('TRUSTED ACROSS INDUSTRY & ACADEMIA' / 'ADOTTATO IN INDUSTRIA & ACCADEMIA'). Testimonials section visually harmonized with dark slate-950→slate-900 gradient, eyebrow 'VOCI DAL METODO' / 'VOICES FROM THE METHOD', amber stars, blue/indigo accents, prev/next carousel functional. Steve Dapper #professor section renders. Zero console errors. Mobile (375x812) responsive layout confirmed.

issues: Long Italian quote text overflows the fixed-height card creating internal scroll/clipping at narrow viewports — quote content visually crops at the top edge of the card. Consider auto-height or reduced font on mobile.

action_items: (LOW) On mobile (≤375px), Testimonials card uses fixed height causing long quotes to crop. Switch to min-h with auto-height or shrink font-size on mobile.
(CARRYOVER from iter 7, optional) CorporateQuoteForm <select> still hardcodes 'Seleziona...' placeholder in EN — wasn't part of this iteration scope but remains open.
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.jsx is now ~1100+ lines including industryLogos, additionalClients, academicPartners arrays + COPY object — strongly recommend extracting i18n COPY and brand arrays into /src/i18n/homepage.js and /src/data/partners.js to keep page <700 lines.
TestimonialsSection.jsx may still have legacy unused i18n keys (globalRecognitions/recognitionsDesc) carried from iter 7 — verify and prune.
Trusted section's logo white-on-dark filter is applied via inline class — consider centralizing to a utility class for reuse across other dark-bg logo grids.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (14/14 features passing, 1 minor mobile design issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 validated end-to-end. All trusted section (logos, pills, partners), Navbar 7-item IT/EN, bilingual toggle, harmonized testimonials, carousel, professor section, and zero-console-error checks pass. The brand names EF Education First / Cambridge / Oxford / Harvard ARE allowed on homepage as 'partners' per user clarification — no compliance flag. Only minor follow-up is mobile testimonial card overflow (cosmetic) and the carryover EN <select> placeholder leak inside CorporateQuoteForm from iter 7. Section order verified: Hero → Credibility Strip → Trusted → What VocalFitness Is → How → Audience → Integrate → Programmes → CEFR → Testimonials → Selected Contexts → Steve Dapper → Final CTA.
